description: Investigating recurring inability of the treatment-wing rooms to hold setpoint, with Room 3 running too cold by mid-morning. Suspected failing compressor and short-cycling on the wing's rooftop unit. Reviewing refrigerant charge and zone-damper behavior to find the root cause.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — recurring HVAC faults in treatment wing

description: Tracking repeated fault codes on the ultrasound therapy unit that halt output mid-treatment. Investigating whether the transducer head or the power board is the source, and reviewing the device's recent service history for a pattern.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — recurring ultrasound unit fault codes

description: Investigating why the hydraulic exam tables in the treatment wing are losing pressure and drifting down under load. Suspected worn seals or a failing hydraulic pump across the same batch of tables. Reviewing whether multiple units need rebuild or replacement.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — exam-table hydraulics losing pressure

description: Tracking intermittent and full WiFi outages on the PT gym / rehab floor. Suspected an aging access point covering the back of the gym that is dropping clients. Reviewing controller logs and AP health to confirm the failing unit before replacement.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — WiFi drops traced to aging gym access point

description: Investigating repeated boot failures and black-screen hangs on the EMR charting workstations. Multiple machines on the same standard image are affected. Suspected a bad graphics driver in the current workstation image that needs to be rebuilt and re-deployed.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — EMR workstation boot failures from bad image

description: Tracking repeated failures of the clinical-area badge reader to read credentials. Suspected a firmware bug in the door controller that drops the reader after a period of uptime. Reviewing controller logs and firmware revision against the vendor's known-issue list.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — badge-reader controller firmware bug

description: Investigating recurring alarms and incomplete cycles on the instrument autoclave. Suspected a failing door gasket and a marginal heating element preventing the sterilizer from holding pressure and temperature. Reviewing cycle logs to confirm before parts are ordered.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — autoclave failing to complete cycles

description: Tracking repeated front-desk printer outages where the device drops offline and won't pick up jobs. Suspected a flaky network print queue and an aging print server connection. Reviewing whether the printer should move to a direct IP queue.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — front-desk printer repeatedly going offline

description: Investigating VoIP call drops and audio jitter concentrated at the front desk. Suspected an undersized internet uplink with no QoS prioritization for voice traffic during busy hours. Reviewing bandwidth utilization and call-quality metrics to confirm.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — VoIP jitter from undersized uplink

description: Tracking the recurring leak from the cold-therapy ice machine. Suspected a cracked supply line fitting and a clogged drain causing overflow. Reviewing the unit's plumbing connections to determine whether a repair or replacement is needed.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — recurring ice machine leak

description: Investigating why multiple parking-lot pole fixtures fail to come on at dusk. Suspected failed photocell controls and aged ballasts on the older fixtures. Reviewing whether to convert the lot to LED heads with new photocells to resolve it permanently.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — recurring exterior lighting failures

description: Tracking the dead receptacle in Treatment Room 4 and whether it points to a larger circuit issue. Suspected a tripped or failing breaker, or a loose neutral, on the circuit feeding that room. Reviewing the panel to confirm scope before re-energizing.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — dead circuit in treatment room

description: Investigating chronic jamming on the front-desk chart-label printer. Suspected a worn feed roller and a media-size mismatch in the driver settings. Reviewing whether a roller kit and a corrected label profile resolve the recurring misfeeds.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — chart-label printer chronic jamming

description: Tracking recurring server-room high-temperature alarms. Suspected an undersized or failing mini-split serving the room that can't keep up with equipment heat load. Reviewing runtime and supply-air temps to confirm whether the cooling unit needs service or upsizing.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — recurring server-room overheating

description: Investigating why the guest WiFi captive portal intermittently fails to load for waiting-room patients. Suspected a misconfigured portal redirect and an expired certificate on the guest network. Reviewing the firewall guest policy and portal service to confirm.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — guest WiFi captive portal failures

description: Tracking the e-fax outage affecting inbound referrals and outbound orders. Suspected an issue with the e-fax provider's SIP trunk or a lapsed line configuration after the last carrier change. Reviewing send/receive logs to pinpoint where faxes are failing.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — e-fax service failures

description: Investigating recurring freezes on the lobby self check-in kiosk. Suspected a memory leak in the kiosk application build and a thermal issue inside the enclosure. Reviewing whether a software update and added ventilation resolve the lockups.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — check-in kiosk freezing

description: Tracking the recurring error code that stops the rehab-gym treadmill shortly after start. Suspected a failing speed/safety sensor or a worn drive belt tripping the fault. Reviewing the unit's error log to confirm the failing component before parts are ordered.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — rehab treadmill recurring fault

description: Investigating the recurring water intrusion in the back supply room. Suspected a roof flashing failure or a condensate-line leak from the rooftop unit above. Reviewing the roof and the unit's drain to determine the source before water damages stock.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — recurring supply-room leak

description: Tracking why clinical tablets drop their EMR session near the far end of the gym. Suspected weak coverage and roaming gaps between access points in that area. Investigating in tandem with the gym AP replacement to confirm coverage is the underlying cause.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — tablets dropping EMR session from weak gym coverage
